_comment: Word count with fully partitioner-managed placement and topology.
placement:'all' nodes are expanded to one copy per machine automatically.
load       → load_0, load_1            (each reads the locally staged corpus)
distribute → distribute_0, distribute_1  (fan-out base slot: out_base=30)
map_n      → map_n_0_{0..9}, map_n_1_{0..9}  (fanout:10 applied per machine)
aggregate  → aggregate_0, aggregate_1  (each collects its machine's map outputs)
shared_inputs is auto-derived from the 'load' Input node; no need to declare it.
placement_policy controls where these land (default: pack = colocate on fewest hosts).
'pack'      — colocate on fewest hosts (default when field is omitted)
'spread'    — at most one auto-node per host
